enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from Boulder early on January 20, 2017 after an all-nighter working on a project called 'Plenty.' He shares life updates including losing his debit card, retrieving a rocket box from his mom's garage to work on his car, and his current media consumption (the show Borgia, a Roman history podcast).
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Most realistic historical retelling he has watched, feels like experiencing actual history
Thinks it is the best way to portray books and plans to make it available for others to download
